title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
summary: Google DeepMind presented upgrades to Gemini 3, including improved model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use. The presentation focused on enabling developers to build agentic applications using Gemini through Vertex AI and shared research advancements in agent design.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through Gemini 3 updates from Google DeepMind: stronger model reasoning, an expanded context window, and improved multimodal tool use. The session centers on building agentic applications with Gemini via Vertex AI, and it includes research advances in agent design. The takeaways are practical for developers targeting multi-agent systems and multimodal workflows on Google Cloud.
